name: Rubi's Barbershop
tagline: A clean, cozy Santa Rosa barbershop where Rubi listens, takes her time, and sends you out looking exactly how you wanted.
seoDescription: Rubi's Barbershop is a 5-star barbershop at 589 Montecito Center in Santa Rosa, CA — precise cuts and beard trims in a clean, welcoming chair for the whole family.

sections.heading: A precise cut, a real conversation, a chair you’ll come back to
sections.subheading: Rubi’s Barbershop earns its perfect 5-star rating one chair at a time — a skilled barber who actually listens, a clean and airy space, and the kind of warm energy that makes the whole family ask for the same chair next time.
badges: Cuts & beard trims for the whole family

sections.heading: The barber people drive across town for
body: Rubi built her shop on a simple idea: listen first, then cut. Clients describe her as a highly skilled professional with a humbling personality — someone who hears exactly what you want and delivers it, every visit.
The room matches the work: clean, airy, and light, with an easy energy that makes a haircut feel less like a chore and more like a stop you look forward to. It’s become a go-to for the whole family.
highlights: Skilled, attentive, and easy to talk to
A go-to for the whole family

items.description: Skin fades and tapers blended the way they’re supposed to be.

items.description: Crisp edges and the small details that make a cut look finished.

items.title: A genuine 5-star reputation
items.body: A perfect rating built on cuts that come out right.

items.title: She listens first
items.body: Tell her what you want — she delivers exactly that.

items.title: Clean, comfortable space
items.body: Airy, light, and welcoming the moment you walk in.

items.title: Easy to find & book
items.body: Right in Montecito Center, with simple online booking.

sections.heading: Ready for a cut that’s actually right?
sections.body: Find Rubi’s Barbershop at 589 Montecito Center. Call or text (707) 806-2481 to book your chair.

sections.heading: Everything to walk out sharp
sections.subheading: Cuts, fades, beard work, and kids’ cuts — all in a clean, welcoming Santa Rosa chair where the details get done right.

items.a: Yes, when a chair is open — and you can book ahead online to lock in a time.
Absolutely. Rubi’s is family-friendly and great with kids.
At 589 Montecito Center in Santa Rosa.
Open Monday–Friday 9am–6pm and Saturday 9am–5pm; closed Sunday.
